mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE mem_id = #{memId} AND mem_pw = #{memPw} AND status = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MEM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO member VALUES(SEQ_MEM.CURRVAL, #{memId}, #{memPw}, NULL, #{memName}, #{deptNo}, NULL, DEFAULT, DEFAULT)
mapper.select: SELECT uni_no, uni_name FROM university WHERE uni_no != 0
SELECT dept_no, dept_name FROM department WHERE uni_no = #{uniNo}

SELECT m.mem_no, m.mem_id, m.mem_pw, m.mem_name, u.uni_no, u.uni_name, d.dept_no, d.dept_name, m.student_no, a.authority, m.phone ,m.create_date, m.status FROM member m LEFT JOIN department d ON m.dept_no = d.dept_no LEFT JOIN university u ON u.uni_no = d.uni_no LEFT JOIN authorities a ON m.mem_no = a.mem_no WHERE m.mem_id = #{userName}
